'''pafava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wabbling|wabbling]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wabbling|wabbling]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pafava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfævæth|pæfævæth]] || [[word:pæfævæj|pæfævæj]] || [[word:pæfævæsh|pæfævæsh]] || [[word:pæfævæ|pæfævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafafavath|pafafavath]] || [[word:pafafavaj|pafafavaj]] || [[word:pafafavash|pafafavash]] || [[word:pafafava|pafafava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafavath|pafavath]] || [[word:pafavaj|pafavaj]] || [[word:pafavash|pafavash]] || [[word:pafava|pafava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafafvath|pafafvath]] || [[word:pafafvaj|pafafvaj]] || [[word:pafafvash|pafafvash]] || [[word:pafafvaf|pafafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafavatha|pafavatha]] || [[word:pafavaja|pafavaja]] || [[word:pafavasha|pafavasha]] || [[word:pafavaka|pafavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafavath|pafavath]] || [[word:pafavaj|pafavaj]] || [[word:pafavash|pafavash]] || [[word:pafava|pafava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafavathal|pafavathal]] || [[word:pafavajal|pafavajal]] || [[word:pafavashal|pafavashal]] || [[word:pafavakal|pafavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafavathatha|pafavathatha]] || [[word:pafavajaja|pafavajaja]] || [[word:pafavashasha|pafavashasha]] || [[word:pafavaka|pafavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafavathan|pafavathan]] || [[word:pafavajan|pafavajan]] || [[word:pafavashan|pafavashan]] || [[word:pafavakan|pafavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafavathaoro|pafavathaoro]] || [[word:pafavajaoro|pafavajaoro]] || [[word:pafavashaoro|pafavashaoro]] || [[word:pafavakaoro|pafavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
